info.description: Cost estimation APIs for OpenSearch Managed Clusters and Serverless Collections.
info.title: OpenSearch Pricing Calculator API

autoSelectWarmInstance.description: Enable automatic warm instance selection based on storage (default: true)

coldPercentage.description: Percentage of data to store in cold tier (0-100)

dynamicSizing.description: Enable workload-aware configuration scoring instead of cheapest-first ranking

multiAzWithStandby.description:
Multi-AZ with Standby option - when enabled, 1/3 of instances are standby and don't take traffic
Thread calculations use only 2/3 of instance count, and minimum 2 replicas are enforced

warmPercentage.description:
Warm and Cold storage tier support (percentage-based)
Allows distributing data across hot, warm (UltraWarm), and cold (S3) storage tiers

autoSelectWarmInstance.description: Default true - auto-select warm instance type

dynamicSizing.description: Enable workload-aware configuration scoring instead of cheapest-first ranking

multiAzWithStandby.description:
Multi-AZ with Standby option - when enabled, 1/3 of instances are standby and don't take traffic
Thread calculations use only 2/3 of instance count, and minimum 2 replicas are enforced

warmInstanceType.description: Warm instance type selection (optional - if not specified, auto-select based on storage size)

autoSelectWarmInstance.description: Enable automatic warm instance selection based on storage (default: true)

coldPercentage.description: Percentage of vectors to store in cold tier (0-100)

derivedSource.description: Storage compression options (applies to non-vector data storage)

dynamicSizing.description: Enable workload-aware configuration scoring instead of cheapest-first ranking

exactKNN.description: When true, vector memory is 0 but storage remains same

multiAzWithStandby.description:
Multi-AZ with Standby option - when enabled, 1/3 of instances are standby and don't take traffic
Thread calculations use only 2/3 of instance count, and minimum 2 replicas are enforced

warmPercentage.description:
Warm and Cold storage tier support (percentage-based)
Allows distributing vectors across hot, warm (UltraWarm), and cold (S3) storage tiers

zstdCompression.description: Enable ZSTD compression (~20% storage reduction for non-vector data)

timePerDayAtMax.description: hours per day at maximum rate

derivedSource.description: Storage compression options (applies to non-vector data storage)

zstdCompression.description: Enable ZSTD compression (~20% storage reduction for non-vector data)
